Apply Now!
Assured BDO Placement

Equitas SFB IGNITE Program

A short 2-week residential launchpad program in collaboration with Equitas Small Finance Bank. Get selected first, trained, and deployed as a Business Development Officer.

Home / Courses / IGNITE Program

Program Details

Quick overview of Equitas SFB IGNITE program features.

Salary CTC Package

₹ 3.5 LPA + Incentives

Designation

Business Development Officer (BDO)

Program Duration

2 Weeks

Job Locations

Mumbai, Thane, Pune, Nagpur, etc.

Equitas Small Finance Bank Ignite Program

A fast-track residential training course that equips you with core marketing and sales strategies.

The Equitas Small Finance Bank Business Development Officer Program, in collaboration with TrueKnack, is a job-assured, fast-track career launchpad into India’s growing banking industry. This intensive 2-week residential training equips you with practical skills in modern banking practices, customer engagement, and sales strategies, making you fully job-ready.

What We Promise:

  • ✓ 100% Job Assurance with Equitas Small Finance Bank.
  • ✓ Job Offer Letter issued before training begins.
  • ✓ 2-Week Intensive Training at Baddi University (residential).
  • ✓ Training by experienced ex-bankers.
  • ✓ Assured Starting Salary of ₹ 3.5 LPA + Performance Incentives.

Ignite Journey

Follow these 6 steps to start your career at Equitas Small Finance Bank.

1
Register Online
Fill out your profile details on the TrueKnack admissions portal.
2
Aptitude Assessment
Clear the online screening test of basic capability.
3
Virtual Interview
Face-to-face panel interview conducted online by bank HRs.
4
Get Offer Letter
Receive your official provisional Job Offer Letter from Equitas SFB.
5
Campus Training
2-Week intensive residential training at Baddi University.
6
Join Equitas SFB
Deploy immediately as a Business Development Officer in Maharashtra.

Eligibility Criteria

Review requirements to qualify for selection by Equitas SFB.

Qualification

Graduation with minimum 50% marks in any degree discipline.

Age Limit

Aged 26 years and below at the time of screening.

Program Fee & Performance Bonus

Earn your full training fee back upon completing your first year of service.

Program Course Fee

₹ 42,000 + GST

Covers all training, tuition, study material, boarding, and lodging costs at Baddi University during the 2-week course.

Performance Bonus

₹ 42,000 Refund

The full training program fee is refunded back to you as a performance bonus after completing 12 months at Equitas Small Finance Bank.

Frequently Asked Questions

Frequently asked questions about the IGNITE program.

The 2-week intensive training takes place at the Baddi University Campus (residential boarding & lodging provided).
Yes! You receive a Job Offer Letter from Equitas SFB prior to the start of your training, ensuring 100% job placement.
After successfully completing 12 months of service as a BDO at Equitas Bank, the full training fee of ₹ 42,000 is paid back to you as a bonus.

Request Program Details

Submit your inquiry and our admissions team will get back to you with the brochure.
